current_tdd_approach.methodology: London School TDD with heavy mocking
current_tdd_approach.validation_claimed: All tests passing, components working correctly

critical_misses.tdd_gap: Mocked API responses didn't validate actual parameter format
Component isolation prevented testing state flow
No contract tests between frontend and backend

high_risk_indicators.signal: Component isolation testing without integration tests
API responses mocked without schema validation

successful_patterns.implementation: Test actual API calls with real backend
Test with production-like data and API calls

learning_feedback.model_adjustment: Increase weight for contract testing importance

immediate_actions: Add contract tests for all API endpoints
Implement browser automation for critical user journeys
Reduce mock usage to < 30% of test suite
Add integration tests with real backend calls
methodology_improvements: Shift from London School to Detroit School TDD for integration-heavy features
neural_pattern_updates: Flag high mock usage as risk indicator
Prioritize contract testing in TDD workflows
Auto-suggest browser automation for UI-heavy features
Validate API parameter formats in pre-commit hooks
